CREATE TABLE dates_table (id UInt32, event_date DateTime);
SELECT event_date, toMonday(event_date) AS nearest_monday FROM dates_table;
SELECT id, toMonday(toDateTime(event_date)) AS nearest_monday FROM dates_table WHERE event_date < '2023-04-25 00:00:00';
SELECT id, toMonday(toDate(event_date)) AS nearest_monday FROM dates_table WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM dates_table WHERE event_date > '2023-04-20 00:00:00');
SELECT t.id, t.event_date, toMonday(t.event_date) FROM dates_table t JOIN (SELECT id FROM dates_table WHERE event_date > '2023-04-19') AS subquery ON t.id = subquery.id;
SELECT DISTINCT toMonday(toDateTime(value)) FROM (SELECT '2023-04-21' AS value UNION ALL SELECT '2023-04-22' UNION ALL SELECT '2023-04-23' UNION ALL SELECT '2023-04-30') AS date_values;
SELECT id, toMonday(toDateTime('2023-04-21 10:20:30')) AS rounded_date FROM dates_table WHERE toMonday(event_date) = '2023-04-17';
WITH date_series AS (SELECT toDateTime('2023-01-01') + INTERVAL number DAY AS date_val FROM numbers(365)) SELECT date_val, toMonday(date_val) FROM date_series WHERE toMonday(date_val) < '2023-07-01';
